parsed.production_notes: 2D motion graphics and app screencast. No human actors or generative AI artifacts present.

characters.appearance: Stylized 2D green owl. Large eyes, yellow beak, wearing round black glasses.

panels.panel_visual_description: Solid white background. A flat-vector green owl character with large eyes and a yellow beak wears round black glasses in the lower half.

scenes.visual_description: Mobile app interface with a top progress bar. A vocabulary question is displayed with 'Yes' and 'No' buttons. A cursor clicks 'Yes'. The green owl mascot appears from the bottom with a speech bubble.
scenes.on_screen_text: Is this a real English word? PREVALENT Yes No If you got it right then you are ready to take the DET!

scenes.visual_description: Solid bright green background. A white badge logo with a green interior shape sits above promotional text.
scenes.on_screen_text: duolingo english test Take unlimited free practice tests
